about.label: ABOUT US
about.title:
MICE Platformer,
PlanningPub
about.intro: Since its founding in 2015, PlanningPub has been driving digital innovation in the MICE (Meeting, Incentive, Convention, Exhibition) industry. Going beyond simple event management, we have positioned ourselves as a MICE Platformer that integrates planning, operations, and data analytics through our proprietary platform, PlanningHUB.

mission.label: MISSION
mission.title: Our Mission
mission.desc: Leading the digital transformation of the MICE industry to build an ecosystem where anyone can plan and manage events easily and efficiently.

vision.label: VISION
vision.title: Our Vision
vision.desc: Becoming Asia's No.1 MICE Platform Company and an essential partner for event planners worldwide.
